title: hot-swap zombie guard: kill stale wkappbot-core workers after Eye swap
desc: After Eye hot-swap, old wkappbot-core MCP/analyze/slack-route workers are not killed by CoreSwapWatcher alone. A post-swap scan kills all wkappbot-core processes except self and new Eye.
steps: After new Eye process is ready, scan Process.GetProcessesByName('wkappbot-core') and kill all except self (Environment.ProcessId) and new Eye pid.
Log count of killed stale workers via Console.Error [EYE:HOT-SWAP].
author: claude
